concept: Tool / Implement / To Use as Instrument
description: An implement used to carry out a particular function; to use something as an instrument. 'Tenoa' names what extends human capability—the shaped object that amplifies intention into action.
sound_symbolism: The word touches purpose. 'Te' touches with contact, hand meeting implement. 'No' extends with capability reaching. Then 'a' opens to action, tool completing work.
grammatical_notes: Noun: 'tenoa' (the tool) - the implement that extends human reach. Every tool acts through 'roe' (with) and its deed's own verb.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Appropriate technology—tools scaled to human needs, repairable, understandable.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Tools as craft—each tool learned through apprenticeship, becoming extension of maker's skill.
